response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match: nearly two decades of engineering experience with the last several years squarely in the TypeScript/Node.js fullstack space (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq), including React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker and Kubernetes. Critically, his current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement that most candidates lack. His deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, Selenium instruction) fits the quality-focused mandate. Main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, and Python experience and limited recent React depth relative to his backend work, all of which are learnable given his demonstrated polyglot range.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, a rare and explicitly required skill
Long TypeScript/Node.js fullstack track record with cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes exposure
Exceptional testing pedigree: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, and testing course instructor
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin and Python are absent from his skill set; Java exposure appears dated
Frontend depth leans on Ember.js historically, with React confined mainly to one role
